name: Mini Oreo Magical Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Reserve 20 cookies for garnish. Prepare the brownie mix according to package directions. Stir in the remaining cookies. Spread the batter evenly in a greased 12-inch pizza pan. Bake at 350°F for 18-20 minutes, or until done.
2. Sprinkle marshmallows over the hot brownie; bake for an additional 3-5 minutes or until lightly browned. Sprinkle with nuts, candies, and remaining cookies, pressing lightly into the softened marshmallows. Cool slightly on a wire rack. Cut into wedges; serve warm or cool.
